Package global.thalion.ttio

Class RamanImage

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.RamanImage
public class RamanImage extends Object
Raman hyperspectral imaging dataset: width × height pixel grid, each pixel a Raman spectrum of spectralPoints intensity values sampled at a shared wavenumber axis.

Stored under /study/raman_image_cube/ as a 3-D float64 intensity cube with a 1-D wavenumbers axis.

Composition vs inheritance notes match MSImage.

API status: Stable (v0.11, M73).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIORamanImage, Python ttio.raman_image.RamanImage.
